1_clean_state.description: State was already clean from previous tests

2_create_sequential_workflow.description: Created workflow with sequential task dependencies (A → B → C)
2_create_sequential_workflow.actual: 3 tasks created: Task A (no dependencies), Task B (depends on A), Task C (depends on B). Workflow 'Sequential Workflow' created with all task IDs

3_start_sequential_workflow_execution.description: Started workflow execution, verified workflow run created
3_start_sequential_workflow_execution.expected: Workflow run created, tasks execute in order A → B → C
3_start_sequential_workflow_execution.actual: Workflow run 'run-sequential-workflow' created. readyTasks showed only Task A initially. Task B and C were pending until dependencies completed

4_create_parallel_workflow.description: Created workflow with parallel task execution (X and Y independent, Z depends on both)
4_create_parallel_workflow.expected: Tasks created with correct dependencies for parallel execution
4_create_parallel_workflow.actual: 3 tasks created: Task X (no dependencies), Task Y (no dependencies), Task Z (depends on X and Y). Workflow 'Parallel Workflow' created

5_start_parallel_workflow_execution.description: Started parallel workflow execution, verified workflow run created
5_start_parallel_workflow_execution.expected: X and Y can execute in parallel, then Z executes after both complete
5_start_parallel_workflow_execution.actual: Workflow run 'run-parallel-workflow' created. readyTasks showed both Task X and Task Y initially (readyCount: 2). Task Z was pending until both X and Y completed

6_workflow_run_tracking.description: Used list_workflow_runs and get_workflow_run to inspect runs
6_workflow_run_tracking.expected: Run status updates as tasks complete, task statuses updated in run
6_workflow_run_tracking.actual: list_workflow_runs returned 2 runs. get_workflow_run showed detailed task statuses, execution order, completion times. Summary tracked total/completed/failed/inProgress/pending counts

7_workflow_run_advancement.description: Manually completed tasks and used advance_workflow_run to progress
7_workflow_run_advancement.expected: Dependent tasks become available after prerequisites complete
7_workflow_run_advancement.actual: Sequential: After A completed, advance_workflow_run made B ready. After B completed, advance made C ready. Parallel: After X and Y completed, advance made Z ready

8_failed_task_handling.description: Created workflow with failing task, marked task as failed
8_failed_task_handling.expected: Workflow handles failure, dependent tasks don't execute
8_failed_task_handling.actual: Task marked as failed. advance_workflow_run detected failure, workflowStatus changed to 'failed'. Dependent task did not become ready (newlyReadyTasks: [])

9_verify_persistence.description: Waited 2 seconds for debounced save, verified thoughtflow-state.json
9_verify_persistence.expected: Workflow runs persisted with correct state, task statuses persisted
9_verify_persistence.actual: All workflow runs persisted with correct status, execution order, timestamps. Task statuses persisted correctly. Workflow run history maintained

key_findings.sequential_execution: WORKING - Tasks execute in dependency order (A → B → C)
key_findings.parallel_execution: WORKING - Independent tasks execute concurrently (X and Y together)
key_findings.run_tracking: WORKING - list_workflow_runs and get_workflow_run provide detailed run information
key_findings.task_status_updates: WORKING - Task statuses update correctly during execution
key_findings.failed_task_handling: WORKING - Failed tasks prevent dependent tasks from executing
key_findings.persistence: WORKING - All workflow execution state persists correctly
